signals.headline: South Korea Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026, Up from 2.0% Target Hit in Prior Months | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026, from 2.0% in January and February—marking a departure from the Bank of Korea's (BOK) 2% target amid rising oil prices tied to Middle East tensions[2][4]. This follows January's five-month low of 2.0%, driven by lowe
